entry.title: IDC GS00Q17NSD3009 (P01536) awarded to VERIZON BUSINESS NETWORK SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE VERIZONS SUBMISSION NUMBER VZ03719.01A DATED JANUARY 24, 2024 INTO THE CONTRACT. THE SUBMISSION ADDS PRICING AND ASSOCIATED MAPPING RELATIONSHIPS REQUIRED TO ADD ACCESS ARRANGEMENTS (AA) AT NETWORK SITE CODES (NSCS) LOCATED WITHIN PREVIOUSLY AWARDED CBSAS. 2. THE ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT REMAINS UNCHANGED. 3. EXCEPT AS PROVIDED HEREIN, ALL PRICES, TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE DOCUMENT REFERENCED IN ITEM 10A REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT.

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: PRESIDENTIAL ISSUED EMERGENCY DECLARATION, OR A MAJOR DISASTER DECLARATION

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
